content.text:
Now I have a clear view of the molecule and can identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 22 (C:22). From the image, I can see that atom C:22 is connected to:

1. C:23 (carbon) - to the left
2. C:21 (carbon) - to the right  
3. H:29 (hydrogen) - above

Let me double-check if there are any other neighbors by rotating the molecule slightly to ensure I haven't missed any connections.

Looking at the structure more carefully, atom C:22 appears to be part of a ring system or chain where it has three connections total: two carbon atoms (C:21 and C:23) and one hydrogen atom (H:29).

The geomconf_index for this molecule appears to be 5060, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_5060.xyz".

So the neighbor atoms of atom index 22 (C) are:
- Atom index 21, element C
- Atom index 23, element C  
- Atom index 29, element H

Geomconf_index: 5060

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 22, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
